# Agnes AI Usage Analytics Dashboard

> Visualize Agnes AI multimodal usage from a single CSV export. The app runs entirely in the browser and shows text tokens, image counts, video duration, cost, requests, per-key, per-project, and trend analytics. Open source, bilingual, and privacy-first.

## Core Capabilities

- Upload one Agnes usage CSV
- Parse `Consumption Quantity` into text tokens, image counts, or video seconds
- Classify each row's `Type` as `api_call`, `image`, `video`, or `unknown`
- Count only `Consumption Status=success`
- View `Overview`, `By Project`, `By Key`, and `Trends` — each with three co-equal metrics
- Sort tables by tokens, images, video duration, requests, or cost
- Filter by model when multiple models exist
- Generate social share cards with multimodal annotations
- Process everything locally in the browser

## Notes

- Current app version: `0.1.1`
- Default public domain fallback is `https://agnes-usage.xyz`
- DeepSeek sister-project links are managed centrally via `src/lib/sisterProjects.ts`
- External links are intentionally preserved during this migration pass
